## Areas Served

- Dubai (Primary - 33+ projects)
- Abu Dhabi (2+ projects)
- Ras al Khaimah (1+ project)
- Maldives (3 projects - resort/residential)
- Mauritius (1 project)

### Dubai Communities
- Safa Park, Dubai Water Canal, Dubai Harbour, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai Marina, and more

## Property Types Available
- Apartments, Penthouses, Villas, Sky Palaces, Mansions, Sky Villas, Sky Mansions, Townhouses, Resort Residences
- 1 to 6 bedroom configurations available

## Why Choose XLCR

ft. to 27,000 sq. ft. - Design: Designed by Killa Design, interiors by HBA
- Features: Two floors of amenities, 360-degree views, private elevators opening directly into living room, exclusive golf course membership, 24/7 worldwide concierge app by Lujo, personal parking in fully enclosed garage, EV charging stations, ceiling heights from 4.

## Services

### Off-Plan Property Sales
- Specializing in off-plan property investments in Dubai and across the UAE
- Exclusive and early access to new property launches from top developers
- Expert consulting for overseas and new-to-Dubai buyers

### Luxury Homes
- Premium luxury residential property sales
- High-end villas, penthouses, sky palaces, and mansions
- Exclusive developments in Dubais most prestigious locations

### Property Consulting
- Brokerage and consulting services on realty projects throughout the UAE
- Investment advice for off-plan and ready properties
- Portfolio management, divestment and risk management consulting
- Market intelligence and property valuation guidance

### Buyer Representation
- Understanding buyer requirements and presenting multiple options
- Managing existing client portfolios
- Referral services through established network

## Partner Developers

XLCR works with the most established and reputable property developers in Dubai and UAE:

- DAMAC Properties - Casa developments and luxury projects
- Danube Properties - Affordable luxury developments
- Ellington Properties - Design-led developments
- LIV (Select Group) - Premium waterfront living (LIV Marina)
- Emaar Properties - Dubais largest developer (Emaar Beachfront, Downtown Dubai)
- London Gate - Luxury branded residences
- Majid Al Futtaim (MAF) - Mixed-use developments
- Nakheel - Palm Jumeirah and island developments
- Six Senses - Ultra-luxury resort residences (Select Group)
- Sobha Realty - High-quality residential developments
- AHS Properties - Ultra-luxury developments (Casa Canal)
- Palma Development - Award-winning designs, portfolio worth AED 16 billion
- MGS Development - Dubai luxury projects
- ETC Properties - UAE developments

## Featured Developments

### Casa Canal (by AHS Properties)
- Location: Dubai Water Canal, Safa Park
- Property Types: 3-6 bedroom Sky Palaces, Villas, Mansions and Penthouses
- Size Range: 4,250 sq.

## Co-Founders

- Nick Grassick - Co-founder, has resided and sold property in Dubai since 2008
- Lyndsey - Co-founder, has resided and sold property in Dubai since 2010

Together they bring nearly 50 years of combined real estate experience.

In a marketplace where competitor real estate companies value their headcount, and pace at which they can grow their team, as their key success barometer; XLCR views success differently. XLCR has a desired company structure of very experienced consultants who manage an existing portfolio of established clients; consulting not only to their buying needs but also their divestment and risk management requirements.

An intrinsic ability to understand our buyers requirements, and present multiple options from a suite of possibilities, ensures our valued and longstanding client base continue to engage our services and refer the same to their friends and colleagues. ### Our Mandate

The mandate of XLCR is very simple, to deliver excellence.

### Connecting Those Dots

The people who are XLCR have created, nurtured and developed substantial relationships with key, senior individuals within the regions most established and reputable property developers. These relationships, which often result in exclusive and early access to new property launches, are the added value XLCR can provide. A deep, yet broad, understanding of the property market is required when consulting to a buyer who is overseas or new to the Dubai real estate market.

Throughout this 14 and 12 year period both Lyndsey and Nick have forged long-term relationships with buyers, sellers and property developers; resulting in a market-wide network. This significant level of intellectual property can only be gained with tenure, and is consequently put to exclusive use for XLCR client base.

XLCR provides brokerage and consulting services on realty projects throughout the UAE. ## About Us

XLCR Real Estate (Pronounced Excelsior) is a boutique property company based in Dubai; providing brokerage and consulting services on realty projects throughout the UAE. Formed in 2021, the two co-founders collectively possess nearly 50 years real estate experience, each of whom have resided and sold property in Dubai since 2008 and 2010.

# XLCR Real Estate - Knowledge Base

## Company Overview

Company Name: XLCR Real Estate Brokers (Pronounced Excelsior)
Type: Boutique luxury real estate brokerage
Founded: 2021
Location: Dubai, UAE
Website: https://www. xlcr. ae
Tagline: Off-Plan Investment & Luxury Homes Specialist — Dubai

Description: XLCR Real Estate is a premier boutique off-plan luxury real estate brokerage in Dubai, specializing in off-plan property and high-end real estate across the UAE.

aiSettings.systemPrompt: You are an AI assistant for XLCR Real Estate Brokers (pronounced Excelsior) — a boutique off-plan luxury real estate brokerage in Dubai. Founded 2021 by Nick Grassick and Lyndsey, with nearly 50 years combined experience. Services: Off-Plan Property Sales, Luxury Homes, Property Consulting, Buyer Representation, Portfolio Management, Divestment & Risk Management. Developer partners: DAMAC, Danube, Ellington, Select Group (LIV, Six Senses), Emaar, Nakheel, Sobha, AHS Properties, Palma Development. Featured: Casa Canal (3-6BR Sky Palaces from 4,250-27,000 sqft). Areas: Dubai (33+ projects), Abu Dhabi, RAK, Maldives, Mauritius. Contact: xlcr.ae, WhatsApp available. Instructions: Answer based ONLY on this info, be professional, respond in English, keep concise.
aiSettings.greeting: Hello! Welcome to XLCR Real Estate. I can help you explore off-plan investments, premium developments, and luxury properties across Dubai. How can I assist you?
